title: Durga mantra
intro: Maa Durga Mantra with meaning. Chant this supreme mantra to receive the grace of Goddess Durga.
description:
Om Dum Durgayai Namaha॥
Om, I bow down to the Goddess Durga, who is the protector and remover of all suffering and difficulties.

faq.q1: When should Maa Durga Mantra be chanted?
faq.a1: Maa Durga Mantra is considered auspicious when chanted in the morning, evening, or during Navratri with devotion.
faq.q2: How many times should Maa Durga Mantra be chanted?
faq.a2: It is commonly chanted 11, 21, 51, or 108 times.
faq.q3: What are the benefits of chanting Maa Durga Mantra?
faq.a3: According to Hindu tradition, chanting this mantra is believed to bring courage, confidence, protection, and the blessings of Goddess Durga.
faq.q4: Can Maa Durga Mantra be chanted daily?
faq.a4: Yes, Maa Durga Mantra can be chanted every day with devotion.
faq.q5: Can anyone chant Maa Durga Mantra?
faq.a5: Yes, anyone may chant Maa Durga Mantra with faith and devotion.
